filters.ledgerAccountSearchPlaceholder: Search by account ID or owner…

shell.searchPlaceholderRich: Search merchants, payments, settlements, customers — or run an action…

kbd.tip: Tip: paste an ID to jump

helpPage.title: Help
helpPage.description: Short tips for the staff dashboard
helpPage.localeNote: Use the language switcher (TH/EN) in the top bar. Your choice is stored in a cookie and the page reloads to apply the full UI in that language.
helpPage.docsNote: Use "Docs" in the sidebar to open the interactive API reference (Scalar) in a new tab. It is available in local and staging; production may disable it. Use the same base URL as the API the admin app is configured to call.
helpPage.accessNote: If a sidebar item is missing, your staff role may not include access. Ask a super admin to update your role.

moneyFlow.title: Money flow
moneyFlow.subtitle: {range} · payins + payouts moved; fees shown separately · Asia/Bangkok
moneyFlow.totalMovedNote: Successful payins plus completed payouts. Fees are not included.

recentLedger.title: Recent General Ledger
recentLedger.subtitle: Latest accounting transactions. Click any row to inspect debit and credit entries.

merchants.title: Merchants

export.title: Export merchants
export.description: Download merchants as a CSV file. Large result sets are capped at 5,000 rows — narrow filters if needed.
export.scopeCurrentPageDesc: Export the rows visible on this page.
export.scopeAllMatchingDesc: Walks the filtered list, up to 5,000 rows.
export.tooMany: Result set exceeds 5,000 rows. Narrow the filters and try again.

bulkActions.freezeNoneActive: No active merchants in your selection. Only active merchants can be frozen.
bulkActions.freezeConfirmDescription: Frozen merchants cannot process new payments, payouts, or settlements. Existing pending operations stay paused until the merchant is unfrozen.

toast.feePresetFailed: Merchant created, but fee preset could not be applied. Set fees manually.
toast.resellerCreateFailed: Merchant created, but the reseller entity could not be created. Create it from Resellers or retry.
toast.feePartialSave: {succeeded} of {total} fee rows saved — review the rest manually

success.title: Merchant created
success.description: Your new merchant account is ready to use.

bankAccount.title: Add a bank account
bankAccount.description: Link a Thai bank account for settlement payouts.

integration.title: Create an integration
integration.description: Issue API credentials so the merchant can create payment intents.

fees.descriptionStandard: Standard preset applied. Review or override per integration.
fees.descriptionDefault: Using platform defaults. Override if this merchant needs custom rates.
fees.descriptionLater: Set the rate this merchant pays on inbound and outbound flows.

members.title: Invite team members
members.description: Add staff from the merchant side — accountants, operators, viewers.

branding.title: Branding & contact
branding.description: Company logo, legal address, and contact details for invoices.

welcome.title: Welcome to the app — {name}
welcome.subtitle: The merchant account has been created and fully configured on the app platform. Ready to use immediately.
welcome.greeting: Hello, Team {name} — welcome to the app! 👋
welcome.intro: Your merchant account has been created and fully configured on the app platform. Ready to use immediately.

loginInfo.title: Login credentials
loginInfo.warning: ⚠️ Please change password on first login

welcome.signoff: For questions, contact app support anytime.

limits.platformDefaultFootnote: Muted values use platform defaults — no merchant-specific override is set.

fees.feesLaterNote: Fees will be configured later. Platform defaults (1.5%) apply until then.
fees.feesDefaultNote: Using platform defaults. Fee rows are applied at 1.5% inbound and 1.5% outbound.
fees.feesPartialNote: {succeeded} of {total} fee rows saved. Review and complete configuration manually.

nextStepsSimple.loginNote: Login to the merchant dashboard using the owner email and temporary password.
nextStepsSimple.changePasswordNote: Change the password on first login.
nextStepsSimple.webhookNote: Set up a webhook URL for real-time transaction notifications.
nextStepsSimple.apiDocsNote: Review the API documentation for integration guidance.

merchants.emptyDescription: Onboard a merchant to get started.

form.name: Name
form.merchantDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the merchant's business

reseller.description: Enabling this allows the merchant to operate as a platform for their own sub-merchants. Sub-merchants will only see this merchant's brand — they are unaware of the app.
reseller.commission: The difference between this merchant's fee rate and their sub-merchants' rates becomes this merchant's commission.
reseller.toggleHelp: If enabled, this merchant can create and manage their own sub-merchants and earn commissions on their transactions.

form.autoSettlementEnabledDescription: Automatically settle transactions on the configured schedule
form.dailyTransactionLimitDefaultHelp: Defaults to ฿500,000 / day if left blank
form.monthlyTransactionLimitDefaultHelp: Defaults to ฿2,000,000 / month if left blank
form.dailyTransactionCountLimitDefaultHelp: Defaults to 10,000 transactions / day if left blank
form.monthlyTransactionCountLimitDefaultHelp: Defaults to 300,000 transactions / month if left blank

feeConfig.emptyState: No fee rows. Switch to a different preset or add a row.

fees.title: Fees

default.inbound: Inbound — Platform default 1.5%, charged at settlement.
default.outbound: Outbound — Platform default 0.5%, charged at payout from wallet.

fees.later: Fees configured after creation. Until set, platform defaults apply.

standard.inboundExample: Example: ฿1,000 settlement → ฿15 fee → ฿985 to bank
standard.outboundExample: Example: ฿1,000 payout → ฿5 fee → ฿1,005 reserved from wallet

custom.methodSettlement: Fee charged once per settlement batch

method.transaction_based: Fee = Σ(tx × rate + flat). Flat fee per transaction.
method.settlement_based: Fee = batch total × rate + flat. Flat fee once.

reseller.title: Reseller enabled
reseller.cascade: This merchant can create sub-merchants and earn commission via the gap rule.
reseller.notInheritable: Reseller status does not propagate to their sub-merchants.

tips.slug: Slug must be unique and URL-safe. Use the merchant's brand handle.
tips.risk: Risk level affects required KYC and verification thresholds.
tips.owner: The owner becomes the first member with role=Owner. They cannot self-remove without transferring ownership first.
tips.reseller: Enabling reseller creates a separate reseller entity for the owner (reseller portal access). Sub-merchants are assigned via reseller_id, not inherited.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
validation.dateFormatInvalid: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
validation.minFeeGreaterThanMax: Min fee must be less than or equal to max fee
validation.customFeesRequireRow: At least one fee row is required for custom preset

activate.title: Activate "{name}"?
activate.description: This will mark the merchant as active and allow them to process payments.

suspend.title: Suspend "{name}"?
suspend.description: This will suspend the merchant and prevent payment processing.

detail.confirmChangesDescription: Review the changes below before saving. These settings affect how this merchant operates.
detail.confirmLimitsDescription: Changing transaction limits affects how much this merchant can process. Review carefully.

perTransaction.title: Per-transaction limits
perTransaction.description: Override per-transaction amount limits. Leave empty to inherit from platform default.

paymentIntents.pageDescription: All payment intents processed for this merchant.

customers.pageDescription: Browse and manage customers belonging to this merchant.

settlements.pageDescription: Track settlement batches processed for this merchant.

payouts.pageDescription: View outbound payouts sent from this merchant's wallet.

apiKeys.pageDescription: Server-to-server Bearer tokens (sk_live_* / sk_test_*) for this merchant.
apiKeys.emptyFiltered: No API keys match these filters.

createDialog.title: Create API key
createDialog.description: Generate a new Bearer token for server-to-server API access. Copy the key after creation — it will not be shown again.
createDialog.copyWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again after you close this dialog.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key
revokeDialog.description: This key will stop working immediately. This action cannot be undone.

webhooks.pageDescription: Manage webhook endpoints that receive event notifications for this merchant.
webhooks.empty: No webhook endpoints for this merchant.
webhooks.emptyFiltered: No webhook endpoints match these filters.

deliveryActivity.title: Delivery Activity
deliveryActivity.subtitle: Daily delivery counts by status
deliveryActivity.empty: No deliveries in this range yet

audit.pageDescription: Review a chronological record of actions and changes for this merchant.
audit.empty: No audit logs for this merchant.
audit.emptyFiltered: No audit logs match these filters.

fees.pageDescription: View and update fee configurations applied to this merchant's transactions.
fees.empty: No fee configurations for this merchant.
fees.emptyFiltered: No fee configurations match your filters.

sidebar.title: Fee inheritance
sidebar.inheritanceNote: Merchant-level rules apply to the project unless a wallet has its own override.
sidebar.precedenceNote: Wallet-specific rules take precedence over merchant-level rules for matching stream types.

create.description: Add a new fee configuration scoped to this merchant.

validation.feePercentageInvalid: Fee percentage must be a number

validation.minFeeMin: Minimum fee must be 0 or greater

validation.maxFeeMin: Maximum fee must be 0 or greater
validation.minFeeGreaterThanMax: Minimum fee must be less than or equal to maximum fee

editWarning.banner: This rate currently applies to {count} inheriting rows. Saving will affect all future matching activity.
editWarning.zero: No dependent rows currently inherit this rate.

confirmSave.description: Review the changes below. The new rate applies to future project transactions.

validation.logoUrl: Enter a valid URL or leave it blank.

validation.color: Use a 6-digit hex color such as #0F766E or leave it blank.

members.pageDescription: Invite, remove, and manage roles for this merchant's team members.

members.portalNote: Invitations and role changes are managed through the Merchant Portal.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

form.success: {count, plural, =1 {1 invitation sent} other {# invitations sent}}

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

result.showOnceWarning: Temporary passwords are shown once. Copy them now and share them securely. Each user must change the password on first login.

integrations.pageDescription: Manage API integrations and credentials for this merchant.

bavModeDescription.required: Require provider verification before KBNK dispatch.

bavModeDescription.skip: Send KBNK bypass for trusted merchants without provider BAV.

limits.title: Payment and payout limits
limits.inheritHint: Leave a money field blank to inherit the platform default.

validation.transactionAggregateRange: Daily transaction limit cannot exceed monthly transaction limit.
validation.depositRange: Deposit minimum cannot exceed deposit maximum.
validation.withdrawalRange: Withdrawal minimum cannot exceed withdrawal maximum.
validation.paymentRange: Payment minimum cannot exceed payment maximum.
validation.payoutRange: Payout minimum cannot exceed payout maximum.
validation.paymentAggregateRange: Daily payment limit cannot exceed monthly payment limit.
validation.payoutAggregateRange: Daily payout limit cannot exceed monthly payout limit.

bankAccounts.pageDescription: View bank accounts linked to this merchant for settlements and payouts.

bankAccounts.searchPlaceholder: Search by bank or account holder…
bankAccounts.addViaMerchantApp: Bank accounts can be created and reviewed here.

createDialog.title: Add bank account
createDialog.description: Create a new merchant bank account.

validation.accountNumberMin: Account number must be at least 6 digits
validation.accountNumberMax: Account number must be at most 20 digits

reverifyDialog.title: Re-verify bank account?
reverifyDialog.description: This creates a new verification on the provider and increments the attempt count. Use Sync first if you only need to refresh the existing status.

bankAccounts.syncTooltip: Pull current status from provider without creating a new verification

syncDialog.title: Sync from provider?
syncDialog.description: Pulls the current status of the existing verification from the provider and updates the local record. Does not create a new verification or change the attempt count.

reveal.title: Reveal full account number?
reveal.description: This action will be recorded in the audit log.

editSheet.title: Edit bank account
editSheet.description: Update bank, account number, or holder name. Re-verification will be triggered automatically when sensitive fields change.

confirmReverify.title: Re-verify after saving?
confirmReverify.description: Changing the bank, account number, or holder will trigger a fresh verification. The status will reset to pending until the provider responds.

validation.accountNumberMin: Account number must be at least 6 digits
validation.accountNumberMax: Account number must be at most 20 digits

editLocked.pending: Editing locked while verification is pending

setDefaultDialog.title: Set as default bank account?
setDefaultDialog.description: This will replace the current default. All future settlements will use this account.

deleteDialog.title: Delete bank account?
deleteDialog.description: {bank} ••••{last4} will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

bankAccounts.deleteLocked: Cannot delete the default bank account. Promote another bank first.

settings.pageDescription: View and edit merchant profile, risk settings, limits, and branding.

ban.title: Ban "{name}"?
ban.description: This will deactivate their account. They will no longer be able to log in.

unban.description: This will reactivate their account and restore access.

activate.description: This will restore their account access.

suspend.description: This will block their access. They will not be able to log in.

emailVerification.confirmDescription: This will mark {email} as verified without requiring the staff member to click a verification link.

new.title: New Provider
new.description: Add a new payment provider configuration.

sidebar.slugHint: URL-safe identifier used in routes and credentials. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
sidebar.authHint: How the platform authenticates outbound API calls to this provider. Add credentials after creation.
sidebar.defaultHint: Only one default provider at a time. New payin/payout flows use the default when no integration override is set.

validation.slugInvalid: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

create.title: New Provider
create.description: Add a new payment provider configuration.

overview.pageDescription: Provider health, performance and transaction volume.

retire.title: Retire Provider
retire.description: Move this provider to deprecated status through the guarded retire flow.
retire.body: Retiring removes the provider from active operations while preserving historical records and audit trails.
retire.defaultBlocked: Unset this provider as default before retiring it.
retire.confirmDescription: The provider status will be set to deprecated. Open payment intents or payouts block this unless force is enabled.
retire.force: Force retirement even with open activity

health.pageDescription: Current status and health check history.

create.title: Add Credential
create.description: The secret value will be encrypted before being stored.

rotate.title: Rotate Credential
rotate.description: Replace the stored secret with a new value. The old value will be overwritten.

delete.title: Delete Credential
delete.description: This will permanently remove the credential. This action cannot be undone.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep existing value

description.oauth2: This provider uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Configure the client credentials and optional API key below.
description.oauth2_api_key: This provider uses OAuth 2.0 with API key credentials. Configure the API key and API secret below.
description.api_key: This provider uses API key authentication. Configure the key and secret below.
description.hmac: This provider uses HMAC signature authentication. Configure the API key and HMAC secret below.
description.basic_auth: This provider uses HTTP Basic authentication. Configure the username and password below.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Credential
confirmDelete.description: This will permanently remove this credential. This action cannot be undone.

webhook.title: Webhook Settings
webhook.endpointDescription: Copy this URL and configure it in your provider's webhook settings (e.g., KBank). This is where the provider sends webhook notifications to the app.
webhook.noEndpoint: No webhook endpoint configured for this provider.
webhook.secretDescription: Used to verify that incoming webhook requests are from the provider.

errors.providerConfigHint: Invalid provider URLs. Open Providers → Settings.
errors.providerInitHint: Provider failed to start. Check Providers.
errors.providerNetworkHint: Provider network request failed. Check KBNK staging connectivity and try again.
errors.providerTimeoutHint: Provider request timed out. Try again after KBNK staging recovers.
errors.providerRateLimitedHint: Provider rate limit reached. Wait before retrying.
errors.providerAuthHint: Provider authentication failed. Check Providers → Credentials.
errors.credentialMissingHint: No provider credentials configured. Open Providers → Credentials.
errors.credentialInvalidHint: Provider credentials are invalid or incomplete. Check Providers → Credentials.
errors.providerInactiveHint: The payment provider is inactive. Activate it under Providers.
errors.providerUnhealthyHint: The payment provider is unhealthy. Try again later or check Providers → Health.
errors.adapterNotFoundHint: No adapter is registered for this provider. Contact support.
errors.noProviderVerificationIdHint: No provider verification ID yet. Use Re-run verification first.

reverify.title: Re-run Verification
reverify.description: This will submit a new verification request to the provider. The attempt counter will increment.

sync.title: Sync Status
sync.description: Pull the latest status from the provider without creating a new verification request.

form.overrideReasonPlaceholder: Describe why you are overriding this verification...

notices.providerAttentionDescription: The verification remains retryable. Re-run after the provider is healthy, or use Manual Override only after out-of-band evidence.
notices.missingProviderIdDescription: Sync is available after a provider verification ID exists. Re-run sends a request to the configured KBNK provider.

reconcile.confirmDescription: Detection-only sweep — compares each wallet's stored balance against the SUM of its ledger entries. Reports mismatches without making any changes.

preview.empty: Select merchant and bank account to see preview.

preview.bankReceivesHint: Wired to the merchant's bank account
preview.walletDebitHint: Charged separately from the merchant wallet on completion

helpCard.title: What's a settlement?
helpCard.description: A settlement moves funds from the app platform to the merchant's bank account for collected transactions, minus applicable fees.

bulkComplete.title: Complete {count} settlements
bulkComplete.description: This will release real money for each settlement, debit each merchant's wallet, and cascade commissions. Per-row failures are reported individually — none of these are reversible.

preflight.title: Pre-flight check
preflight.summary: {count, plural, =1 {# settlement} other {# settlements}} ready to complete
preflight.cannotProceed: One or more wallets cannot cover the required fees. Resolve before proceeding.

submitting.title: Completing {count} settlements…
submitting.hint: Some banks may take a moment — do not close this window.

sections.feeCascadeEmpty: Cascade data not available — check the event log.

settlement.title: What is a settlement?
settlement.body: A settlement bundles eligible transactions for one merchant project and transfers the gross amount from the app operating bank account to the merchant's bank account. Each settlement covers a snapshot of transactions chosen at create time.

moneyFlow.title: How does the money reach the merchant?
moneyFlow.body: The full gross amount is wired from the app's bank account to the merchant's verified bank account via standard bank transfer. The bank receives 100% of the gross — no fee is deducted at the bank rail. Reconciliation matches the bank statement directly against the gross figure.

fee.title: How is the fee charged?
fee.body: Fees are billed as a separate wallet debit when the admin marks the settlement completed. The fee resolves from the merchant project, then platform defaults. The platform pre-flights the wallet balance (available_balance ≥ fee) before allowing completion; insufficient balance returns WALLET_INSUFFICIENT and the admin can settle a capped subset of the largest eligible transactions.

feeStorage.title: Where does the fee go?
feeStorage.body: The wallet debit is cascaded up the reseller hierarchy as commission credits to each ancestor's wallet, with the final residual credited to the app's platform wallet. Every leg is a distinct ledger entry — fee_debit equals the sum of all commissions plus the platform residual (conservation rule).

banner.slipRequired: Slip required to complete this settlement. Upload a screenshot or PDF of the bank confirmation.
banner.slipUploaded: Slip uploaded. Verify the amounts and click Complete to release funds.

fields.bankReceivesHint: Wired to the merchant's bank account

dropzone.title: Drag a slip here, or click to upload
dropzone.hint: JPG, PNG, or PDF · Max 5 MB

noSlip.title: Drag and drop a file, or click to select
noSlip.hint: Supported: JPG, PNG, PDF · Max 5 MB
noSlip.completedWithoutSlip: No slip on file (settlement was completed without slip).

validation.mimeType: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG, or PDF.

complete.title: Complete this settlement
complete.description: This will send the gross amount to the merchant's bank, debit the fee from their wallet, and cascade commissions up the reseller chain. This action is irreversible.

receipt.transactionNote: Bank receives gross. Fee debits wallet separately. They are two transactions, not one.

complete.confirmNameLabel: Type the merchant name to confirm
complete.confirmNameHint: This settlement is over ฿100,000 — extra confirmation required.
complete.errorSlipRequired: A slip must be uploaded before completing this settlement.
complete.errorWalletInsufficient: Merchant wallet has insufficient balance to cover the fee. Top up the wallet first.
complete.slipStagedHint: Will be uploaded when you confirm

cancel.title: Cancel this settlement
cancel.description: Cancelling a settlement marks it as not-attempted and frees up the included transactions to be settled again later. Use this when you created the settlement in error.
cancel.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you cancelling this settlement?

fail.title: Fail this settlement
fail.description: Use this when the bank transfer did not go through, or you decided not to proceed. This is irreversible — the settlement enters the failed state and cannot be re-completed without creating a new settlement.
fail.noWalletMovementBody: Failing a pending settlement is a pre-completion abort. The wallet has not been debited yet — it will not be debited by this action.
fail.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this settlement is being failed...
fail.reasonRequired: Please describe why this settlement is being failed.

cascade.noCommissions: No reseller commissions on this settlement (merchant sits directly under the platform).
cascade.invariantWarning: Cascade segments do not sum exactly to total fee. Check with engineering.

source.empty: No ledger transactions found for this source record

trialBalance.title: Trial Balance
trialBalance.description: Aggregate debits and credits per account. Grand totals must balance.
trialBalance.balanced: Ledger is balanced — total debits equal total credits
trialBalance.unbalanced: Ledger is NOT balanced — investigate immediately
trialBalance.empty: No accounts in the trial balance

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Compare wallet column projections against GL-derived balances. Non-zero deltas indicate bugs.
reconciliation.empty: All wallets are in sync — no drift detected

entryDescription.merchantNetCredit: Net amount credited to the merchant wallet
entryDescription.walletDepositNetCredit: Net top-up credited to the wallet
entryDescription.walletWithdrawalCompleted: Reserved funds used for merchant withdrawal
entryDescription.walletWithdrawalExternalTransfer: Withdrawal sent to the merchant bank
entryDescription.manualWalletCreditCounterparty: Balancing entry for a manual wallet credit
entryDescription.manualWalletCredit: Manual credit added to the wallet
entryDescription.manualWalletDebit: Manual debit taken from the wallet
entryDescription.manualWalletDebitCounterparty: Balancing entry for a manual wallet debit
entryDescription.settlementTransferredToMerchantBank: Settlement sent to the merchant bank
entryDescription.settlementFeeDebit: Settlement fee charged to the merchant wallet
entryDescription.payoutCompleted: Reserved funds used for customer payout
entryDescription.payoutExternalTransfer: Payout sent to the customer bank
